name: push-notifications
summary: Expo push notifications: permission + token registration, server-stored device tokens (RLS), tap-to-route handling.
postInstall: npx expo install expo-notifications expo-device  (push needs a dev/standalone build, not Expo Go on Android)
iOS: enable Push Notifications capability in the build; Android FCM is handled by EAS credentials
Send pushes from your server using the stored Expo tokens via Expo's push API (no key in the app)
Replace src/features/notifications/ui/notifications-screen.tsx after the Claude Design pass
